task_completion.description: Locate the patient Thomas Baker in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient profile or search results for 'Thomas Baker' are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Find the 'General Checkup' appointment scheduled for tomorrow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific appointment titled 'General Checkup' for Thomas Baker is selected, opened, or clearly visible in the schedule.
A status dropdown, label, or indicator for the appointment is changed to 'Cancelled'.
A notes, comments, or description field contains the text 'Patient called to cancel due to work conflict' (or at least 'work conflict').

task_completion.description: Save the changes while ensuring the appointment record is not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save button is clicked or a success confirmation is shown, and the appointment remains visible in the system (e.g., listed as cancelled rather than disappearing from the schedule).

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a calendar, scheduling, or EHR web/desktop application, rather than terminal commands or raw database API calls.

integrity.description: The agent entered the note into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cancellation note is typed into the designated text area within the appointment system, not a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete the appointment record.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of clicking a 'Delete' button or a 'Record Deleted' confirmation message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Thomas Baker. Appointment Title: General Checkup. Expected Status: Cancelled. Expected Note Content: Must contain 'work conflict' (specifically 'Patient called to cancel due to work conflict'). The appointment record must be updated, not deleted.
